title: sweetly steamed vietnamese beetroot pho
description: pungent, silky, nostalgic vietnamese dish featuring cooked beetroot, kombu-cold-extract, plant-based-friendly, served in a fondue-pot

ingredients.name: beetroot
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into 1-inch thick rounds

instructions: in a fondue-pot or a large saucepan, combine kombu and veggie broth over low heat.
bring the broth to a gentle simmer and cook for 20 minutes, or until the kombu is rehydrated.
add sliced beetroot to the broth and cook for an additional 30 minutes, or until the beetroot is tender.
strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, discarding the kombu and beetroot.
add rice vinegar, maple syrup, and sesame oil to the broth and stir to combine.
cook rice noodles according to package instructions and divide among bowls.
ladle the steaming hot broth over the noodles and top with slaw mix, toasted sesame seeds, and a sprinkle of rice vinegar.
